channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Hosts Key Talks on Israel–Lebanon Ceasefire as Tensions with Hezbollah Escalate
item.description: US President Donald Trump is hosting talks at the White House aimed at extending a ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah. This follows escalating violence, particularly Israeli airstrikes in southern...

item.title: James Valentine’s Voluntary Assisted Dying: Barriers to Access Across Australia
item.description: James Valentine, the beloved broadcaster and saxophonist, passed away this week on his own terms, opting for voluntary assisted dying (VAD) in his final days. He made the decision to use VAD after bei...

item.title: Cardoso demands quick bounce-back from Sundowns after Stellenbosch draw
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns coach Miguel Cardoso has called for an immediate reaction from his side after they dropped points for the first time this year, settling for a 1-1 draw against Stellenbosch at Loftus...

item.title: NDLEA raises concern over rising drug abuse as 14 million Nigerians affected
item.description: The National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) don raise serious alarm say more than 14 million Nigerians dey affected by illicit drug use, with about 400,000 people from Ondo State among them. The ...

item.title: RFK Jr. echoes Trump’s inaccurate claims about drug price reductions and misinterprets percentage calculations
item.description: Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. publicly defended President Donald Trump’s claims about dramatically reducing prescription drug prices, despite widespread criticism that thos...

item.title: Southern California Man Pleads Guilty to Running Car Rental Scheme for Organized Theft Ring
item.description: A 59-year-old Canyon Country man, Juan Carlos Thola Duran, has pleaded guilty to playing a central role in a large-scale organized theft operation that caused nearly $24 million in losses across the U...

item.title: Tilak Varma and Abhishek Sharma rediscover form with crucial IPL centuries
item.description: The article highlights a notable trend in IPL 2026, where left-handed batters have been playing a decisive role in shaping matches and team fortunes. While young sensation Vaibhav Suryavanshi has grab...

item.title: RCMP Searches in Hare Bay Fail to Locate Jennifer Hillier-Penney’s Remains Despite Suspect’s Confession
item.description: The RCMP conducted extensive searches for Jennifer Hillier-Penney’s remains near the Hare Bay Islands off St. Anthony, Newfoundland and Labrador, following a confession from her estranged husband, Dea...

item.title: Government removes out-of-pocket costs for essential personal care, highlights ongoing aged care funding challenges
item.description: The Australian government has announced that older people receiving home-based aged care services will no longer pay out-of-pocket for essential personal care, including showering, dressing, and conti...

item.title: Multiple factors behind Wale Edun’s removal as Nigeria’s finance minister
item.description: This opinion piece looks into the different explanations surrounding the removal of Wale Edun as Nigeria’s Minister of Finance and Coordinating Minister of the Economy. The writer argues say no single...

item.title: The Benefits and Challenges of School Gardening Programs
item.description: School gardens provide a valuable opportunity for students to engage in hands-on learning, connect with agriculture, and develop a variety of skills. Historically, most Americans lived on farms, makin...

item.title: Authorities Target Illegal Tobacco Market in Canberra with Raids
item.description: In a coordinated effort to tackle Canberra’s growing illegal tobacco trade, authorities have begun raiding black-market tobacco shops across the city. Following a public outcry over the lack of action...

item.title: ASX expected to open flat as tech weakness offsets oil surge and AI-driven optimism
item.description: Australian shares are expected to open largely unchanged, following a softer session on Wall Street where technology stocks dragged major indices lower. Futures for the ASX 200 slipped slightly, indic...

item.title: LTFRB investigates PUV drivers for failing to give mandatory fare discounts
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has issued show-cause orders to three public utility vehicle (PUV) drivers who allegedly failed to provide the mandatory 20% fare disco...

item.title: Long Island PTA Treasurer Arrested for Stealing Over $50K from School Fund
item.description: Jodi Scarlatos, a 43-year-old mother from Centereach, New York, has been arrested for allegedly embezzling more than $50,000 from the Jericho Elementary School PTA while working as a New York Police D...

item.title: Understanding Friendship Dynamics When Initiative Is Uneven
item.description: A 43-year-old man reflects on the sudden loss of his social circle after moving to a rural farm and stopping his usual practice of initiating contact with friends. Despite having been well-liked and f...

item.title: Study Reveals How Earthquakes Abruptly Stop and Affect Ground Shaking
item.description: Recent research has provided the first direct observation of how large earthquakes come to a sudden halt, introducing a phenomenon termed the 'stopping phase'. By analysing seismic, GPS, and satellite...

item.title: Police Conclude Epsom Rape Investigation, No Evidence of Crime Found
item.description: Police have concluded their investigation into an alleged rape in Epsom, which led to protests across the town. The investigation, which had been launched after a woman accused a man of sexual assault...

item.title: Philippine government monitors and protects 15 seafarers after ship seizure incident near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The Department of Migrant Workers (DMW) has assured the public that it is actively monitoring and safeguarding the welfare of 15 Filipino seafarers affected by the recent seizure of ships by Iranian a...

item.title: How Nigerians with Irregular Income Can Save Money Effectively
item.description: In today’s challenging Nigerian economy, saving money may seem nearly impossible for those without a steady income. However, it's not only possible but essential. Nigerians in irregular income jobs—fr...
